seoTitle: Hawley Beach vs Hayes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hawley Beach and Hayes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hawley Beach vs Hayes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawley Beach and Hayes.
heading: Hawley Beach vs Hayes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawley Beach, Tasmania and Hayes, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hayes has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Hawley Beach (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawley Beach or Hayes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawley Beach has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Hayes scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawley Beach scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Hayes scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawley Beach or Hayes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hayes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
